TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Devin Brown sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1978, ryax sa tay 30 nqu tay 12, Devin Brown, squliq na p'unro. (mhuqil sa kawas tay 1999) pincyuwagan nya' pspngan mari sa may yugal yacing masuq mspung mari sa pspngan mari na maycyugal byacing lga. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: *e*in ő≤rown s~…ēraral ńßja Ē…£a s~…ēis~…ējuw na nő≤a, wal malaxmis~…ēuq qanij la. kawas~…ē taj ****, rjax s~…ēa taj ** nqu taj **, *e*in ő≤rown, s~…ēquliq na p Ēunro. (mńßuqil s~…ēa kawas~…ē taj ****) pin ¶~ ®juwa…£an nja Ē ps~…ēpŇčan mari s~…ēa maj ju…£al ja ¶~ ®iŇč mas~…ēuq ms~…ēpuŇč mari s~…ēa ps~…ēpŇčan mari na maj ¶~ ®ju…£al ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč l…£a. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē lis~…ēts~…ē o* national ő≤as~…ēkető≤all as~…ēs~…ēo ¶~ ®iation plajers~…ē
S.FORM: Devin Brown sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1978, ryax sa tay 30 nqu tay 12, Devin Brown, squliq na p'unro. (mhuqil sa kawas tay 1999) pincyuwagan nya' pspngan mari sa may yugal yacing masuq mspung mari sa pspngan mari na maycyugal byacing lga. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
